reference: My thirteen-month-old appears to have a breakout of some sort on his scrotum, with little red bumps. He constantly pulls at the area, and it appears very red. I am certain it is itching. We believe he had an allergic reaction to whole milk, which appears to be slowly clearing. What can I put on the scrotum to ease the itching and the pulling he does? He pulled so much that he tore a hole in his diaper.
text: My 13-month-old appears to have a bright rash on his scrotum, with little red bumps. He constantly pulls at the area, and it appears very red. I am certain it is itching. We believe he had an allergic reaction to whole milk, which appears to be slowly clearing. What can I put on the scrotum to ease the itching and the pulling he does? He pulls so much that he tore a hole in his diaper.
